post.title: Volatility flows, Sentiment read and OpEx - Weekly post (16-20/June)
post.description: Last week, we had a sentiment shift towards growth concerns, inevitably suppressive vol selling feedback loop that ended up in a red 80%+ reversion signal to own the market on the short side.
post.truncated_body_text: Last week, we had a sentiment shift towards growth concerns, inevitably suppressive vol selling feedback loop that ended up in a red 80%+ reversion signal to own the market on the short side. But spot closed above the sentiment-flip level.
